segments.source_text: Why Have Structured Procurement Processes

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Standard term per Section 2 of global file.

segments.source_text: Ensures that all tasks are performed that need to be performed

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Standard term per Section 7 of global file.

segments.source_text: Promotes consistency in processes and outcomes

segments.source_text: Prevents conflict and sub-optimal behaviour

segments.source_text: Supports good governance and managerial control

segments.source_text: Supports the systematic development of procurement staff, systems, technology and other resources

segments.source_text: The term separation of duties means that the processes involved in procurement and supply management are divided between two or more people so that no one person is responsible for the entire purchasing process.
segments.translated_text: La séparation des tâches signifie que les processus d'achats et gestion de la chaîne d'approvisionnement sont répartis entre plusieurs personnes, afin qu'aucun individu n'assume seul l'intégralité du processus d'achat.

term_annotations.preferred_translation: Achats et Gestion de la Chaîne d'Approvisionnement
term_annotations.inline_instruction: Standard term per Section 1 of global file.
Standard term per Section 1 of global file.

segments.source_text: Authorisations and Sign-off

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Standard term per Section 2 of global file.

segments.source_text: Organisations will generally cover requirements for competition - An example…
segments.layout_context: introductory heading inside blue table background
segments.translated_text: Exigences courantes en matière de mise en concurrence — Exemple :

segments.inline_instruction: Retain source currency symbol (£) per Section 11 of global file. Apply French space rule for thousands: '10 000'.

segments.source_text:
• Seek minimum of 2 Quotations
• Where it is not considered advantageous, administratively efficient or practical to seek comparative quotations for purchases below £2,500, one quotation may be sought
segments.translated_text:
• Obtenir au moins 2 devis
• S'il n'est pas jugé avantageux ou pratique de demander des devis comparatifs pour des achats inférieurs à £2 500, un seul devis peut suffire

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Standard term per Section 2 of global file.

segments.inline_instruction: Retain £. Apply French space rule for thousands.

segments.source_text:
• Seek minimum of 4 Quotations
• All requirements must be openly advertised with the process managed using the E-Tendering system unless approval of the procurement team is obtained to run a closed i.e. non advertised process
segments.translated_text:
• Obtenir au moins 4 devis
• Publicité obligatoire pour tous les besoins ; gestion via le système d'appel d'offres électronique, sauf dérogation pour un processus restreint

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Standard term per Section 2 of global file.

segments.inline_instruction: Retain £. Apply French space rule for thousands.

segments.source_text:
• Formal Request For Quotation Process seeking 4 Quotations
• A minimum of 4 suppliers must be invited to submit quotations using an approved format Request for Quotation document. Optionally a formal tender procedure may be used under £100,000. A formal tendering process must be carried out for all procurements above £100,000 in line with existing procedures
segments.translated_text:
• Processus formel de demande de devis auprès de 4 fournisseurs
• Invitation d'au moins 4 fournisseurs via un document type de demande de devis. Procédure d'appel d'offres optionnelle sous £100 000, mais obligatoire pour tout achat supérieur à ce montant conformément aux procédures en vigueur

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Use FR-FR override: 'demande de devis'.

segments.source_text: E-Tendering

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Standard term per Section 2 of global file.

segments.source_text: • The management of quotations and tenders using the E-Tendering system is required for all procurements with a value above £10,000
segments.translated_text: • Gestion des devis et offres via le système d'appel d'offres électronique requise pour tout achat supérieur à £10 000

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Standard term per Section 2 of global file.

segments.source_text: Ethical Codes in P&S

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Translate shorthand 'P&S' consistently as 'Achats et Approvisionnement'.

segments.expansion_note: Translation is 75.0% longer than source. Layout check required.

segments.source_text: Ethical issues for organisations at three levels:
At the macro level:
issues of the role of business and capitalism in society
segments.translated_text: Rôle de l'entreprise et du capitalisme dans la société

segments.source_text: At the corporate level:
issues which face an individual organisation as it formulates strategies and policies about how it interacts with its various stakeholders
segments.translated_text: Stratégies et politiques régissant les interactions avec les diverses parties prenantes

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Standard term per Section 7 of global file.

segments.source_text: At the individual level:
issues which face individuals as they act and interact within the organisation and supply chain
segments.translated_text: Actions et interactions des individus au sein de l'organisation et de la chaîne d'approvisionnement

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Standard term per Section 1 of global file.

segments.source_text: The CIPS Code of Conduct

segments.source_text: Enhance and protect the standing of the profession

segments.source_text: Maintain the highest standards of integrity in all business relationships
segments.translated_text: Maintenir une intégrité absolue dans toutes les relations commerciales

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Related term per Section 3 of global file.

segments.source_text: Promote the eradication of unethical business practices
segments.translated_text: Favoriser l'éradication des pratiques contraires à l'éthique

segments.source_text: Enhance the proficiency and stature of the profession
segments.translated_text: Accroître la compétence et la stature de la profession

segments.source_text: Ensure full compliance with laws and regulations
segments.translated_text: Garantir la pleine conformité aux lois et règlements

segments.source_text: The Ethical Trading Initiative (ETI) Base Code
segments.translated_text: Code de base de l'Ethical Trading Initiative (ETI)

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Retain proper organization name in English. Translate 'Base Code' portion.

segments.source_text: 1. Employment is freely chosen
2. Freedom of association & the right to collective bargaining
segments.translated_text: 2. Liberté syndicale et droit à la négociation collective

segments.source_text: 3. Working conditions are safe and hygienic
segments.translated_text: 3. Conditions de travail sûres et hygiéniques

segments.source_text: 4. Child labour shall not be used
5. Living wages are paid
segments.expansion_note: Translation is 33.3% longer than source. Layout check required.

segments.source_text: 6. Working hours are not excessive
7. No discrimination is practised
8. Regular employment is provided
9. No harsh or inhumane treatment is allowed
segments.translated_text: 9. Aucun traitement cruel ou inhumain autorisé

segments.source_text: https://www.ethicaltrade.org/
segments.inline_instruction: URL — do not translate.

segments.source_text: What is procurement governance?
segments.translated_text: Qu'est-ce que la gouvernance des achats ?

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Standard term.

segments.expansion_note: Translation is 32.3% longer than source. Layout check required.

segments.source_text: Refers to the:

• Rules
• Policies
• Processes
• Organisational structures
By which organisations are:

• Operated
• Controlled
• Regulated
Ensures adherence to:

• Ethical standards
• Good practices
• Law
• Regulations
segments.translated_text:
• Normes éthiques
• Bonnes pratiques
• Lois
• Réglementations

segments.source_text: Why is procurement governance important?
segments.translated_text: Pourquoi la gouvernance des achats est-elle importante ?

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Standard term.

segments.expansion_note: Translation is 40.0% longer than source. Layout check required.

segments.source_text: Procurement staff:
segments.expansion_note: Translation is 44.4% longer than source. Layout check required.

segments.source_text: Potentially control large sums of organisational funds
segments.layout_context: list item next to thumbs up icon

segments.source_text: Are faced by many opportunities to commit financial fraud or to misuse systems or information for personal gain
segments.layout_context: list item next to thumbs up icon
segments.translated_text: Peut être confronté à des risques de fraude financière ou d'usage abusif d'informations

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Standard term per Section 6 of global file.

segments.source_text: Their decisions typically benefit some suppliers over others – creating an incentive for suppliers to try and influence those decisions
segments.layout_context: list item next to thumbs up icon
segments.translated_text: Ses décisions favorisent certains fournisseurs, ce qui les incite à tenter d'influencer ces choix

segments.translated_text: cips.org | L'excellence mondiale en achats et approvisionnement | 80

segments.source_text: Security in Data
segments.expansion_note: Translation is 31.3% longer than source. Layout check required.

segments.source_text: Consideration must be given to ensuring data security is appropriate and considers;
segments.translated_text: La sécurité des données doit être appropriée et tenir compte des facteurs suivants :

segments.source_text: Physical risks e.g. controlling who has access to your buildings and how much of the building they can access, when and where deliveries are made
segments.translated_text: Risques physiques (ex. : contrôle d'accès aux bâtiments, lieux et horaires de livraison)

segments.source_text: Personnel risks (ensuring people are who they say they are, contractors manage sub-contractors effectively and identify possible motives to compromise your information)
segments.translated_text: Risques liés au personnel (vérification d'identité, gestion des sous-traitants par les titulaires du marché)

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Use FR-FR override: 'titulaires du marché' or 'prestataires' depending on context.
Standard term per Section 3 of global file.

segments.source_text: Cyber risks (do suppliers hold sensitive information on secure networks?)
segments.translated_text: Risques cyber (sécurité des réseaux des fournisseurs hébergeant des données sensibles)

term_annotations.inline_instruction: Standard term.
